summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Scriptool single-page site (pt-BR). Validated all 14 review points via Playwright on the public preview URL. 50/51 checks passed. The only 'failure' (contact-form-opens-wa) is a false negative caused by WhatsApp auto-redirecting wa.me links to api.whatsapp.com after window.open — phone number 5541987869936 and pre-filled message are present, so behavior is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsAppFab.jsx uses inline style width/height 60px because Tailwind class 'w-15 h-15' is not a valid Tailwind size — inline style covers it, but the invalid classes should be removed for cleanliness.
Contact form only redirects to WhatsApp (no backend persistence). This matches the PRD (frontend-only), so acceptable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testids match the review spec. Header CTA, hero, FAB, pricing (including accented pricing-cta-básico), FAQ accordion, portfolio filters (all/inst/lp/ecom counts 6/2/2/2), testimonial prev/next/dots, animated counters (87/98/7/4), mobile menu (390 viewport) — all verified. Instagram links correct. No console errors, no page errors. Contact form window.open target validated (URL contains phone + name + empresa) — note wa.me auto-redirects to api.whatsapp.com when opened programmatically; underlying href in code is wa.me.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug. The single 'failed' assertion inspected the popup URL after WhatsApp performed a 301/302 redirect from wa.me to api.whatsapp.com. Source code uses waLink() → https://wa.me/5541987869936?text=... which is correct.
